ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly states 'Trunks'. Depicted figure has purple hair and brown jacket matching Dragon Ball GT Trunks (Adolescence) appearance confirmed by card's special trait 'Saiyan/Earthling' and Black Star Dragon Ball Saga era designation. Identity confirmed via card oracle text.

trivia_bullets.text: Cross Worlds (DBS-B03) is the third booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released March 9, 2018, and draws from multiple Dragon Ball eras including the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga (Dragon Ball GT) and the Majin Buu Saga [TCGPlayer: Cross Worlds set listing].

Quick Rush Trunks (BT3-011) is an Uncommon Battle card carrying the special traits Saiyan/Earthling and the era designation Black Star Dragon Ball Saga, placing this version of Trunks in Dragon Ball GT continuity rather than Dragon Ball Z's future timeline. The card's [Critical] skill deals damage directly to the opponent's life area [dbs-cardgame.com card list].
sources: WebSearch snippet: Quick Rush Trunks TCG details

trivia_bullets.text: In Dragon Ball GT, Trunks is the adult president of Capsule Corporation and wears a brown jacket over dark clothing — the brown open jacket and purple hair seen in this card's art are signature visual identifiers of GT-era Trunks, distinguishing him from the lavender-to-blue-haired Future Trunks of Dragon Ball Z and Dragon Ball Super [Wikipedia: Trunks (Dragon Ball)].
sources: CBR: Dragon Ball Super Why Present and Future Trunks Have Different Hair Colors
